pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java compiler source and target version from 1.8 to 11 to support the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.2.5.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to align with Java 11 support and modern framework features.
Add explicit dependency for javax.annotation-api because it was removed from the JDK module system in Java 11.
Replace joda-time and jackson-datatype-joda with jackson-datatype-jsr310 to use the standard Java 8+ Date/Time API.
Remove individual Dropwizard metrics dependencies in favor of the unified jhipster-framework which manages metrics for Spring Boot 2.
Upgrade Swagger/Springfox dependencies to support OpenAPI 3 (springfox-oas) required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace the deprecated mongeez library with mongock for MongoDB schema migration, as mongeez is incompatible with newer Spring Data MongoDB versions.
Replace the old embedmongo-spring test dependency with de.flapdoodle.embed.mongo for modern embedded MongoDB testing support.
Remove deprecated Spring Cloud Connectors dependencies which are no longer supported in modern Spring Boot versions.
Remove legacy metrics reporter dependency in favor of Micrometer.
Add JJWT dependencies to support modern JWT token handling required by the updated security stack.
Update Spring Boot test dependencies to exclude JUnit Vintage engine, enforcing JUnit 5 native execution.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added exclusion for org.junit.vintage:junit-vintage-engine in spring-boot-starter-test.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven Compiler Plugin to use Java 11 source and target levels and manage annotation processors.
pom.xml.human_impl: Set source/target to ${java.version} and added spring-boot-configuration-processor and mapstruct-processor to annotationProcessorPaths.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure JIB Maven Plugin to build Docker images using an AdoptOpenJDK 11 base image.
Replace the Yeoman/Grunt build process with the frontend-maven-plugin using Node.js and Webpack.

package.json.general_idea: Replace the legacy Grunt-based build and AngularJS dependencies with Angular 11 and the Angular CLI ecosystem.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt, karma, requirejs; Added @angular/core, @angular/cli, webpack

package.json.general_idea: Upgrade the JHipster generator dependency from version 2.19.0 to 7.0.0-beta.0 to support the new project structure.
Replace Karma/Jasmine testing infrastructure with Jest and Protractor for end-to-end testing.
package.json.human_impl: Removed karma, jasmine-core; Added jest, protractor, @types/jest

package.json.general_idea: Rewrite npm scripts to use Angular CLI commands (ng build, ng serve) and Maven wrapper instead of Grunt tasks.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Change message cache duration from integer seconds to ISO 8601 duration format as required by newer Spring Boot versions.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x management properties with Spring Boot 2.x structure.
Replace custom async pool configuration with standard Spring Boot 2.x task execution properties.
Move mail configuration from root level to standard Spring Boot 2.x spring.mail namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: mail.host -> spring.mail.host (implied by removal of root mail block)
